blockingIssues.description: The rerun fix resolves stable-ID cost-band dependencies, but `FlywheelExplorer` still combines `Strategy Agents & Vaults` under one `planned` badge even though social vaults remain `in_progress` elsewhere, so the cross-surface maturity-consistency requirement is still not fully met.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that when an architecture or flywheel node aggregates multiple roadmap concepts with different maturities, workers should either split the node or render differentiated per-concept maturity framing instead of collapsing everything under one badge.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun review for atlas-architecture-dependency-id-and-maturity-consistency-polish found that a combined `Strategy Agents & Vaults` flywheel node still conflicted with roadmap and narrative surfaces because social vaults remained `in_progress` while autonomous strategy agents remained `planned`.
